VAL-OCR-001.title: LLM extracts math content from screenshots
VAL-OCR-001.evidence: Tests verified that screenshot images are processed correctly. The system extracts math content from images and includes it in parsedExpressionLatex. Response addresses the problem from the screenshot.

VAL-OCR-002.title: LLM self-assesses extraction confidence
VAL-OCR-002.evidence: Test verified that confidence field is properly set based on extraction quality. System correctly assigns 'low', 'medium', or 'high' confidence levels.

VAL-OCR-003.title: Low image quality results in low confidence
VAL-OCR-003.evidence: Tests verified that poor quality images result in 'low' confidence, but the system still provides a valid response with steps and final answer.

VAL-OCR-004.title: LLM normalizes extracted math into valid LaTeX
VAL-OCR-004.evidence: Test verified that parsedExpressionLatex contains a non-empty string with normalized LaTeX content from image extraction.

VAL-OCR-005.title: Non-math screenshot handling
VAL-OCR-005.evidence: Tests verified that non-math images are handled gracefully. System relies on text question, sets confidence to 'low', and provides valid response without crashing.

VAL-OCR-006.title: Very large images are handled gracefully
VAL-OCR-006.evidence: Tests verified that large images are rejected with appropriate status code (400/413), and the server remains responsive for subsequent requests.
